project_type: Next.js 15 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS 4 + Prisma ORM education test platform
build_system: npm + next build, Prisma for DB schema
test_framework: No test framework configured - verify via build only
verification_instructions: Run npx next build and confirm it passes without errors
snapshot_or_generated_files: prisma/schema.prisma generates @prisma/client via prisma generate (runs on postinstall)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. DATABASE_URL is live Neon PostgreSQL. Do NOT run prisma db push or migrate without explicit instruction. Use prisma generate only for client generation.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Push to fix/gemini-35-flash branch.
key_patterns: App Router with [locale] prefix, route groups (main), (teacher), (admin), (auth). i18n via next-intl with messages in src/messages/uz.json. API routes in src/app/api/. Components in src/components/. Prisma client at src/lib/db.ts. Auth at src/lib/auth.ts. Uses lucide-react icons, framer-motion, tailwind classes with custom design tokens (primary-600, text-primary, etc). Client components use 'use client' directive. Navigation via @/i18n/routing Link.
directory_structure: src/app/[locale]/(main)/ - user pages (dashboard, tests, results, rating, pricing, profile). src/app/[locale]/(teacher)/ - teacher pages. src/app/api/ - API routes. src/components/ - shared components (ui, layout, test, landing, providers). src/lib/ - utilities (auth, db, utils). src/i18n/ - internationalization. src/messages/ - translation JSONs. prisma/ - schema.
